stemHtml: What does the term METAR signify?

options.a: A METAR is a flight forecast, issued by the meteorological station several times daily.
options.b: A METAR is a landing forecast added to the actual weather report as a brief prognostic report.
options.c: A METAR is a warning of dangerous meteorological conditions within a FIR.
options.d: A METAR signifies the actual weather report at an aerodrome and is generally issued in half-hourly intervals.
